CustomField.description: Reasoning effort for Responses-API reasoning models (gpt-5.x, o-series): minimal, low, medium, or high. Leave blank for non-reasoning models (e.g. gpt-4o), which reject the reasoning parameter.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Reasoning effort for reasoning models (minimal/low/medium/high). Leave blank for non-reasoning models like gpt-4o.
CustomField.label: Reasoning Effort
